entityTypes.name: ship_findings
entityTypes.description: Structured summary of one reporting period: merged PRs, completed tasks, categorized sections, and the generated report's file reference

period_start.description: ISO 8601 start of the reporting window

period_end.description: ISO 8601 end of the reporting window

sections.description: Categorized summary (features, fixes, internal) as structured text

file_id.description: adl_files id of the human-readable report

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the report was generated

entityTypes.name: receipts
entityTypes.description: Structured audit trail of automated actions taken by workspace agents, read by the receipts/team-health dashboard

kind.description: Always "receipt" — distinguishes this record from any other entity type

value.description: Numeric magnitude of the action — see unit

subject.description: What the action was about — a file id or other reference

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the action happened

agentSlug.description: The bot's marketplace slug that performed the action, e.g. "ship-reporter"
